name: temmies-cli

metadata.name: temmies-cli
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A command-line tool for managing assignments using the Temmies library

documentation: # temmies-cli Command Line tool using the [temmies library](https://github.com/Code-For-Groningen/temmies) ## Installation > [!NOTE] > I am currently working on an arch linux package for this tool (AUR). Open an issue if I forget and/or you want me to package it for another distro. A bash script is also in the works. ```bash pipx install temmies-cli ``` ## Usage ## `temmies init /(/) ` ### Initialize a new assignment ```bash temmies init // ``` > `temmies init 2024-2025/advalgo/labs-wk2 .` ### Initializing an entire course ```bash temmies init / ``` ### Optional args - `-s` : Search for an assignment instead of providing the link i.e. `temmies init -s "Advanced Algorithms" `. - `-t `: Specify where you want your tests to be (relative to the parent of each assignment folder). Default is `.`. - `-f `: Specify where you want your files to be (relative to the parent of each assignment folder). Default is `.`. ### File hierarchy example Once the command is ran: ``` . ├── practical_1 │ ├── pizza | | | .temmies <-- This is the temmies file which lets you do `temmies submit` │ │ ├── tcs │ │ │ ├── 1.in │ │ │ ├── 1.out │ │ │ ├── 6.in │ │ │ ├── 6.out │ └── tunnel | | | .temmies <-- there's one of these in each assignment folder │ │ ├── tcs │ │ │ ├── 1.in │ │ │ ├── 1.out │ │ │ ├── 2.in │ │ │ ├── 2.out │ │ │ ├── 3.in │ │ │ ├── 3.out ``` ## `temmies submit ` > `temmies submit main.c` Submits a file to the relevant assignment. You can pass multiple files as well. ### Optional args - `-q` : Quiet submission, don't wait for output ## `temmies status` Shows an overview of the current assignment's status. ### Optional args - `-d` : Adds some more detail (i.e. the leading submission)

functions.name: temmies_cli.cli.cli
documentation: Temmies CLI - A command line tool for managing assignments using the Temmies library.

functions.name: temmies_cli.cli.init
documentation:
Initialize a new assignment or folder.

YEAR_COURSE_PATH: Format '{startyear-endyear}/{courseTag}' or '{startyear-endyear}/{courseTag}/{folder_or_assignment}'.

functions.name: temmies_cli.cli.submit
documentation: Submit file(s) to the relevant assignment.

functions.name: temmies_cli.cli.status
documentation: Show the current assignment's status.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.submit.submit_file
documentation: Submit file(s) to the relevant assignment.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.init.init_assignment
documentation: Initialize a new assignment or course.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.init.search_assignment
documentation: Search for an assignment by name across all years and courses.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.init.recursive_search
documentation: Recursively search for an assignment in a group and its subgroups.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.parse_path
documentation:
Parse the path string into year, course, and target object (assignment or folder).
Supports formats like <startyear-endyear>/<courseTag>/(<folder_or_assignment>).

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.navigate_to_assignment
documentation: Navigate through groups to find the assignment by name.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.download_items
documentation: Download items (e.g., files or test cases) to the specified destination with a progress bar.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.download_test_cases
documentation: Download test cases for the assignment with a progress bar.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.download_files
documentation: Download additional files for the assignment with a progress bar.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.download_assignment_files
documentation: Download all necessary files and test cases for the assignment with progress bars.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.create_metadata_file
documentation: Create the .temmies metadata file.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.load_metadata
documentation: Load assignment metadata from the .temmies file.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.utils.create_assignment_files
documentation: Download files and test cases for a group (folder or assignment) recursively.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.status.status_overview
documentation: Show the current assignment's status.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.status.extract_submission_info
documentation: Extracts and click.echos the most important information from a submission dictionary.

functions.name: temmies_cli.commands.status.normalize_timestamp
documentation:
Normalizes and formats a timestamp string to a readable format.
Args:
    timestamp (str): The timestamp string to normalize.
Returns:
    str: The normalized timestamp in "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" format.
